title: Evolutionary analysis of transcription elongation factors reveals conserved and lineage-specific regulatory domains: Supplementary Data and Code
author: Francette, Alex
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains all source code, datasets, intermediate files, and resulting visualizations for the evolutionary analysis of Transcription Elongation Factors (TEFs) from the manuscript entitled: Evolutionary conservation and innovations of RNA polymerase II transcription elongation factors.
steps_raw: This repository contains all source code, datasets, intermediate files, and resulting visualizations for the evolutionary analysis of Transcription Elongation Factors (TEFs) from the manuscript entitled: Evolutionary conservation and innovations of RNA polymerase II transcription elongation factors.
